Tracker Dokara:
We know that Kasha Orcs have captured four prisoners. You need to rescue them all.
And one more thing... After you rescue the prisoners, can you make sure that the Hestui Warrior makes it back alive?
I have a feeling that he is ready to sacrifice himself to save the prisoners. That would be a noble act, no doubt, but something tells me that we'll need his help in the future.
I'll stay here to meet the rescued prisoners. I think it's about time you went inside, What do you think?
